title: Conditional Colors for Map View
excerpt: Map view conditional color formatting would be a great feature. Allowing for the color to reflect a status column or even a custom color of our choice would make the map view much more functional.

posts.author: ashleybr (Ashley Ralph)
posts.cookedHtml: Map view conditional color formatting would be a great feature. Allowing for the color to reflect a status column or even a custom color of our choice would make the map view much more functional.

posts.author: DrewLeFever (Drew LeFever)
posts.cookedHtml: This is already done by default with the color of the groups but being able to choose a “Color By” option would be awesome!

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

We’re super excited to share our new app with the world, Map View Pro.

It allows you to customize the color of the pins on the map (fe.: color them based on the items status) and choose what information is displayed when you click a pin.

Read more on our docs on what colums we support as source for the Pin Color and what columns we support for the Info Window.

You can try it for free for 14 days here, if you’re missing anything, do let us know!

Best,

Maarten
